name: USS Whitman (DE 24)
events: 10 Dec 1944 USS Blueback (Cdr. M.K. Clementson, USN) conducted exercises off Pearl Harbor together with USS Whitman (Lt.Cdr. R.G. Coan, USNR), USS Wileman (Lt.Cdr. R.M. Tanner, Jr., USNR), USS Connolly (Lt.Cdr. W.A. Collier, USNR), USS Tautog (Cdr. T.S. Baskett, USN) and USS Puffer (Lt.Cdr. C.R. Dwyer, USN).

20 Dec 1944 During 20/21 December 1944, USS Greenling (T/Cdr. J.D. Gerwick, USN) and USS Devilfish (T/Cdr. E.C. Stephan, USN) conducted exercises off Pearl Harbor with USS Whitman (Lt.Cdr. R.G. Coan, USNR) and USS Cabana (Lt.Cdr. R.L. Bence, USNR). These included night exercises.
26 Dec 1944 USS Devilfish (T/Cdr. E.C. Stephan, USN) conducted exercises off Pearl Harbor with USS Doherty (Lt. W.J. O'Brien, USNR) and USS Whitman (Lt.Cdr. R.G. Coan, USNR).

27 Jan 1945 During 27/28 January 1945, USS Peto (T/Cdr. R.H. Caldwell, Jr., USN) and USS Tilefish (T/Cdr. W.F. Schlech, Jr., USN) conducted exercises off Pearl Harbor with USS Whitman (Lt. E.A. Sandor, USNR). In the early evening of the 27th, USS Doherty (Lt. W.J. O'Brien, USNR) also joined. The exercises included night exercises.

2 Feb 1945 USS Chub (Cdr. C.D. Rhymes, Jr., USN) conducted exercises off Pearl Harbor together with USS Ramsay (Lt. R.R. Pollard, Jr., USNR), USS Whitman (Lt. E.A. Sandor, USNR) and USS Tench (Cdr. W.B. Sieglaff, USN).

3 Feb 1945 USS Chub (Cdr. C.D. Rhymes, Jr., USN) conducted exercises off Pearl Harbor together with USS Ramsay (Lt. R.R. Pollard, Jr., USNR), USS Whitman (Lt. E.A. Sandor, USNR) and USS Tench (Cdr. W.B. Sieglaff, USN).

5 Feb 1945 USS Bugara (Cdr. A.F. Schade, USN) conducted exercises off Pearl Harbor together with USS Pruitt (Cdr. P.H. Bjarnason, USN), USS Whitman (Lt. E.A. Sandor, USNR) and USS Lamprey (Cdr. W.T. Nelson, USN).

14 Feb 1945 USS Bugara (Cdr. A.F. Schade, USN) conducted exercises off Pearl Harbor together with USS Pruitt (Cdr. P.H. Bjarnason, USN), USS Florikan (Lt. D. Hima, USN) and USS Whitman (Lt. E.A. Sandor, USNR).
4 Mar 1945 USS Bullhead (Cdr. W.T. Griffith, USN) conducted exercises off Pearl Harbor together with USS Whitman (Lt. E.A. Sandor, USNR) and USS Austin (Lt. W.H. White, USNR).

13 Mar 1945 During 13/14 March 1945, USS Lionfish (T/Lt.Cdr. E.D. Spruance, USN) conducted exercises off Pearl Harbor. These included night exercises. During the 13th the exercises were carried out with USS Whitman (Lt. E.A. Sandor, USNR).
25 Mar 1945 USS Billfish (Lt.Cdr. L.C. Farley, USNR) conducted exercises off Pearl Harbor together with USS Whitman (Lt. E.A. Sandor, USNR) and USS Cero (Lt.Cdr. R. Berthrong, USN).
26 Mar 1945 USS Billfish (Lt.Cdr. L.C. Farley, USNR) conducted exercises off Pearl Harbor together with USS Whitman (Lt. E.A. Sandor, USNR) and USS Cero (Lt.Cdr. R. Berthrong, USN).

27 Mar 1945 USS Billfish (Lt.Cdr. L.C. Farley, USNR) conducted exercises off Pearl Harbor together with USS Pruitt (Lt. D.B. Harby, USNR), USS Whitman (Lt. E.A. Sandor, USNR), USS PC-599 and USS Cero (Lt.Cdr. R. Berthrong, USN).
19 Apr 1945 USS Skate (T/Cdr. R.B. Lynch, USN) conducted exercises off Pearl Harbor with USS Whitman (Lt. E.A. Sandor, USNR).
20 Apr 1945 USS Skate (T/Cdr. R.B. Lynch, USN) conducted exercises off Pearl Harbor with USS Whitman (Lt. E.A. Sandor, USNR).
21 Apr 1945 USS Bumper (Cdr. J.W. Williams, Jr., USN) conducted exercises off Pearl Harbor together with USS Whitman (Lt. E.A. Sandor, USNR).
10 May 1945 USS Cabezon (Cdr. G.W. Lautrup, USN) conducted exercises off Pearl Harbor together with USS Whitman (Lt. E.A. Sandor, USNR) and USS Le Hardy (Lt.Cdr. J.W. Dayton, Jr., USNR).

13 May 1945 During 13/14 May 1945, the following submarines conducted tactical exercises off Pearl Harbor; USS Dace (T/Cdr. O.R. Cole, Jr., USN), USS Lapon (T/Lt.Cdr. D.G. Baer, USN), USS Redfin (T/Lt.Cdr. C.K. Miller, USN), USS Devilfish (T/Lt.Cdr. S.S. Mann, Jr., USN), USS Manta (T/Lt.Cdr. E.P. Madley, USN) and USS Thornback (T/Cdr. E.P. Abrahamson, USN).

They were attacking a dummy convoy of 13 (other source says 16) transports which were escorted by the destroyer USS Chew (Lt.Cdr. J.J. Mannion, USNR), destroyer minelayer USS Pruitt (Lt. D.B. Harby, USNR), destroyer escorts USS Whitman (Lt. E.A. Sandor, USNR), USS Coolbaugh (Lt.Cdr. S.T. Hotchkiss, USNR), USS Darby (Lt.Cdr. M.W. Martin, USNR) and USS PC-782 (Lt.(jg) R.L. Essick, USNR).
16 May 1945 USS Carbonero (Cdr. C.L. Murphy, USN) conducted exercises off Pearl Harbor together with USS Whitman (Lt. E.A. Sandor, USNR) and USS J. Douglas Blackwood (Lt.Cdr. J.L. Johnston, USNR).
